kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Beatrix, Tanner, Duke, and 6 coins belong to different artisans.
Between Edmund and Blacksmith, one goes with Rope and the other with 10 coins.
The Potter's levy is at most 4 coins away from the artisan serving the Duke.
Exactly one of these is true: Rowan goes with Candles; Highrow goes with Sheriff; Oldwall goes with 10 coins.
Millpond goes with exactly one of Edmund, Fletcher, or Duke.
Either Tanner goes with Rowan or someone in the River Ward goes with Blacksmith (but not both).
Fletcher goes with at least two of Godfrey, Candles, Oldwall, and Prince.
The artisan serving the Sheriff's levy is exactly 4 coins more than Rowan.
10 coins goes with exactly two of Edmund, Barrels, and Sheriff.
The artisan who makes Horseshoes' levy is between Rowan and the Tanner.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Boone, Trout, Dough, and 2 lb belong to different catches.
Between Esther and Bass, one goes with Swimbait and the other with 6 lb.
The angler who landed the Pike's weight is at most 4 lb away from the angler fishing with Dough.
Exactly one of these is true: Wade goes with Spinnerbait; Foxglen goes with Nightcrawler; Willowmere goes with 6 lb.
Stillwater goes with exactly one of Esther, Catfish, or Dough.
Either Trout goes with Wade or someone in the North Watershed goes with Bass (but not both).
Catfish goes with at least two of Mabel, Spinnerbait, Willowmere, and Maggot.
The angler fishing with Nightcrawler's weight is exactly 4 lb more than Wade.
6 lb goes with exactly two of Esther, Popper, and Nightcrawler.
The angler using the Spoon's weight is between Wade and the angler who landed the Trout.
